chief_complaint: A 26-year-old patient with symptoms suggestive of thyroid storm during total thyroidectomy.
history: The patient has Friederich's ataxia and hypertrophic obstructive cardiomyopathy, and was undergoing total thyroidectomy due to persistent amiodarone-induced thyrotoxicosis despite high doses of antithyroid drugs and corticosteroids.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are provided.
labs: No specific investigation results are provided.
